rationale: The citing article is an invited editorial that explicitly synthesizes related papers in the same JMR issue on policy simulation, diagnostics, and Lucas-critique concerns, and the cited article’s core contribution is exactly structural modeling for policy simulation under regime shifts. Their focal constructs strongly overlap (structural vs reduced-form modeling, policy invariance, endogeneity, strategic response), so this is plausibly a substantive conceptual source rather than a generic mention; the DOI match confirms a direct reference.
